<!-- AUTOGENERATED by scripts/gen-readmes.sh — edit scenarios.tsv -->
# Apache HTTPD (HTTP) — servlet-mapping

App at / with Vaadin servlet bound to /ui/*. /HILLA/* (Hilla push) lives at the context root, so the proxy rewrites /ui/HILLA/* back to /HILLA/*. /connect/* and root-level static resources flow through the catch-all.

Proxy URL on `http://localhost:9090`: `/ui/`

## Configuration

See [docker-compose.yml](./docker-compose.yml) for service definitions.

Apache HTTPD config (`vaadin.conf`):

```apache
# Hilla push lives at /HILLA on the backend regardless of the
# vaadin.url-mapping setting. See https://github.com/vaadin/hilla/issues/289
# /connect/* is served by the Vaadin servlet at /ui/connect/* — the catch-all
# carries it through unchanged.

ProxyPassMatch   "^/ui/HILLA/(.*)$"  http://vaadin:8080/HILLA/$1 upgrade=websocket
ProxyPass        "/"                 http://vaadin:8080/ upgrade=websocket
ProxyPassReverse "/ui/HILLA/"        http://vaadin:8080/HILLA/
ProxyPassReverse "/"                 http://vaadin:8080/
```
